services.name: Handyman Services
services.description: Professional home repairs, remodeling, plumbing fixture work, drywall, carpentry, doors, windows, and general maintenance services across Pinellas County.

services.name: General Repairs
services.description: Drywall patching, trim repair, caulking, sealing, fixture swaps, punch-list corrections, and mixed repair work for Pinellas County homes.

services.name: Plumbing Services
services.serviceType: Handyman plumbing fixture repair and minor plumbing repair
services.description: Handyman-level plumbing fixture repair, faucet and showerhead swaps, shutoff valves, small leak corrections, and drain-related fixes — not licensed plumbing contractor work.

services.name: Electrical Work
services.description: Like-for-like outlet and switch swaps, ceiling fan installs, light fixture replacements, and minor electrical fixture work within handyman scope.

services.name: Carpentry & Framing
services.description: Trim, shelving, framing repairs, subfloor corrections, custom carpentry, and structural woodwork support for residential repair projects.

services.name: Painting & Finishing
services.description: Interior paint touch-ups, texture matching, trim painting, room refreshes, and finish restoration after repairs in Pinellas County homes.

services.name: Home Renovations
services.description: Bathroom refreshes, flooring updates, tile work, room remodel support, and smaller renovation scopes for occupied Florida homes.

services.name: Doors & Windows
services.description: Door adjustments, hardware fixes, weatherstripping, window repairs, lock corrections, and like-for-like door and window maintenance.

services.name: Custom Projects
services.description: Built-ins, custom shelving, accent walls, specialty installs, and one-off homeowner projects that need a dependable local handyman.

services.name: Emergency Services
services.description: Urgent water shutoffs, temporary weatherproofing, security repairs, storm follow-up fixes, and after-hours handyman response in Pinellas County.
